title: Hand Magic
body:
![Hand Magic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db61b58475dd1b86ca5ae04728e7372a0a47d31f.png)

![Summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d4509d290dc6c9c435837461012bec35b4ff9c.png)

**The Hand Magic Mod brings an interesting and immersive spell-casting experience to Minecraft. Dive into a world where hand gestures, mystical scrolls, and ancient rituals unlock the secrets of powerful magic. Manage your mana through sustenance, engage with a new villager profession, and explore a plethora of spells to dominate your world.**
---

1.5.5 was last update on this mod
There will be no more updates to it

Files of this mod got corrupted and backups too i couldn't restore it
Only if i will start it from 0 and little by little go to full version but it's too power taking

I'm sorry for these news

---

**Unique Spell Casting System**

- Hand Gestures: Perform intricate hand gestures to cast spells, adding a dynamic and interactive layer to your magic use.
  
- Scrolls: Discover or craft scrolls that hold ancient knowledge, allowing you to learn and cast powerful spells.

**Mana System**

- Regenerate Through Food: Mana is tied to your sustenance. The more you eat, the faster your mana regenerates, adding a strategic layer to resource management.

**Rituals and Runes**

- Runic Rituals: Unlock hidden spells and powerful effects by performing complex rituals using runes. Each ritual requires careful preparation and knowledge of ancient symbols.

**New Villager Profession**

- Magician: Villages now have magicians who can trade magical items, provide scrolls, and offer guidance on spells and rituals.
  
**Extensive Spell Collection**

- 50 Spells: Master a diverse array of 50 unique spells, each with its own distinct effects and uses.
  
- Unlockable Spells: 15 of these spells are hidden and can only be unlocked through performing specific runic rituals, encouraging exploration and experimentation.

**Secrets**

- Secret scrolls: ???
  
---
The Hand Magic Mod transforms your Minecraft experience, adding depth, strategy, and a touch of mysticism to your adventures. Master the art of spell casting, manage your resources wisely, and unlock the secrets of ancient magic to become the ultimate sorcerer.

Mod is translated to:

English
